name: letting-go
description: David R. Hawkins' guide to surrendering negative emotions — the letting go mechanism, the Scale of Consciousness, releasing fear/anger/grief/desire/pride, and achieving inner peace through surrender.
useCase: Releasing negative emotions, moving up the Scale of Consciousness, overcoming suppression/expression/escape patterns, healing the past, achieving inner peace.
knownRisks: Hawkins' calibration numbers are based on his own research method (kinesiology) which is not widely accepted in mainstream science
The Scale of Consciousness is a spiritual framework, not a clinically validated diagnostic tool
People with severe trauma or mental health conditions may need professional support alongside this practice
The book's claim that most of humanity calibrates below 200 may feel discouraging to some readers
